items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: OpenAI details its ongoing efforts and strategies to ensure the safe and responsible deployment and use of its text-to-video model, Sora.

items.title: HopChain: Multi-Hop Data Synthesis for Generalizable Vision-Language Reasoning
items.summary: Researchers introduce HopChain, a novel method for synthesizing multi-hop data to improve the generalizability of vision-language reasoning models.

items.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
items.summary: Air Street Capital, a venture capital firm focused on AI, has successfully raised a $232 million fund, positioning it as one of Europe's largest solo VCs.

items.title: Astrolabe: Steering Forward-Process Reinforcement Learning for Distilled Autoregressive Video Models
items.summary: This paper presents Astrolabe, a technique that leverages forward-process reinforcement learning to enhance the distillation of autoregressive video models.

items.title: The Y-Combinator for LLMs: Solving Long-Context Rot with λ-Calculus
items.summary: A novel approach using λ-Calculus is presented to address the 'long-context rot' problem in Large Language Models, improving their ability to handle extended contexts.

items.title: LLM 'benchmark' as a 1v1 RTS game where models write code controlling the units
items.summary: A unique benchmark proposes evaluating LLMs by having them write code to control units in a 1v1 real-time strategy game.

items.title: Engenharia de Prompt: Por Que a Forma Como Você Pergunta Muda Tudo (Um guia introdutório)
items.summary: An introductory guide explains the critical importance of prompt engineering and how the way questions are phrased significantly impacts AI model responses.

items.title: TerraScope: Pixel-Grounded Visual Reasoning for Earth Observation
items.summary: TerraScope introduces a new framework for pixel-grounded visual reasoning specifically designed for complex Earth observation tasks.

items.title: ProactiveBench: Benchmarking Proactiveness in Multimodal Large Language Models
items.summary: This paper proposes ProactiveBench, a new benchmark to evaluate and improve the proactive capabilities of multimodal large language models.

items.title: FlowScene: Style-Consistent Indoor Scene Generation with Multimodal Graph Rectified Flow
items.summary: Researchers introduce FlowScene, a method for generating style-consistent indoor scenes using multimodal graph rectified flow.

items.title: LumosX: Relate Any Identities with Their Attributes for Personalized Video Generation
items.summary: LumosX is a new system designed to generate personalized videos by effectively relating various identities with their specific attributes.

items.title: A Subgoal-driven Framework for Improving Long-Horizon LLM Agents
items.summary: A new subgoal-driven framework is proposed to significantly improve the performance and planning capabilities of LLM agents in long-horizon tasks.

items.title: Versatile Editing of Video Content, Actions, and Dynamics without Training
items.summary: A novel method is introduced that allows for versatile editing of video content, actions, and dynamics without requiring additional training.

items.title: Hyperagents
items.summary: This research explores the concept of 'Hyperagents,' advanced AI agents capable of complex, adaptive behaviors in dynamic environments.

items.title: BEAVER: A Training-Free Hierarchical Prompt Compression Method via Structure-Aware Page Selection
items.summary: BEAVER offers a training-free hierarchical prompt compression method that uses structure-aware page selection to efficiently manage prompts.
